notes.summary: Added manualChunks function to vite.config.js build.rollupOptions.output. Converted the wasted dynamic import of validateAIQuestion in MCPAIAdapter.js to a static import (confirmed 3 other static importers of quizQuestionGenerator.js: aiFallbacks.js, aiPromptBuilders.js, physicsEducationSystem.js).
notes.spec_path_discrepancy: Spec listed MCPAIAdapter.js at src/renderer/services/MCPAIAdapter.js but actual location is src/renderer/game/systems/ai/MCPAIAdapter.js. Applied fix to the real file.
anomalies: GamePage is 519.84 KB — just 19 KB above the 500 KB target. Phaser is now in vendor-phaser but game logic itself (scenes, systems, entities) accounts for the remaining size. This is acceptable; the game page no longer carries Phaser inline.
vendor-rapier is 2081.49 KB — this is the Rapier physics WASM binary bundled as JS. It is a single non-splittable artifact. Exceeds 1 MB follow-up threshold.
vendor-drei is only 4.98 KB — Vite/Rollup is tree-shaking drei aggressively since only a handful of drei helpers are used. This is correct behavior.
vendor-phaser is 1478.41 KB (expected ~1800 KB) — likely some Phaser modules are tree-shaken.

Build warning count: still present for GamePage (519 KB), vendor-three (739 KB), vendor-phaser (1478 KB), vendor-rapier (2081 KB). The route chunk warnings (GamePage/Game3DPage) are largely resolved — warnings now originate from vendor chunks, which is the intended outcome. Game3DPage dropped from 2977 KB to 15 KB.

next_agent_suggestions: vendor-rapier (2081 KB) exceeds 1 MB. Rapier WASM is a single binary blob — consider lazy-loading @react-three/rapier via dynamic import() at the Physics component level to defer load until the 3D scene mounts.
GamePage (519 KB) is 19 KB over the 500 KB target. Game scenes/systems could be dynamically imported per-scene if needed, but this is a low-priority follow-up.
